headline: Honda Civic Infotainment Firmware Vulnerable to Arbitrary Code
lede: A security flaw in 2021 Honda Civic head units allows unauthorized parties to gain control via USB. This vulnerability stems from the use of insecure test keys in the manufacturer update process.

headline: Browser-Based SQL Entity-Relationship Diagram Generation
lede: Visualizing database structures no longer requires external cloud services or account-heavy platforms. This local-first utility renders entity-relationship diagrams directly in your browser without uploading your schema data.

headline: Zhipu AI Releases Open-Weight GLM 5.2 Model
lede: The release of GLM-5.2 signals a shift toward accessible, high-performance frontier intelligence. With a 1M token context window, this model challenges the closed-access status quo in global AI development.

headline: Radiative Cooling for Orbital Data Centers
lede: Operating high-performance hardware in a vacuum requires overcoming the fundamental absence of convective cooling. Physics confirms that blackbody radiation can effectively dissipate heat if engineered with precision.

headline: Commerce Department Bans Differential Privacy Noise
lede: New federal directives remove noise infusion techniques from key statistical products. This decision forces a difficult trade-off between absolute confidentiality and the scientific utility of public datasets.

headline: Monasteries Outperform Modern Firms in Digital Transformation
lede: Centuries-old institutions often succeed where modern corporations fail by prioritizing deep-rooted cultural stability. These findings suggest that long-term mission alignment is a prerequisite for effective digital evolution.

headline: The Case for Perfect Frame Synchronization in UI
lede: Developers often treat software as an animated toy, ignoring the jarring visual artifacts that degrade user trust. True reliability requires coherence in every intermediate frame of an interface.
pullquote: Software is a precise instrument, not a sandbox for sloppy transitions.

headline: Model Performance Degrades Beyond 100k Token Thresholds
lede: Marketed context capacities often hide a significant drop in reasoning quality. Managing information loss requires treating the LLM context as a strictly limited budget.

headline: New Targeted Therapy Hits KRAS Cancer Protein
lede: Clinical trials for daraxonrasib show a breakthrough in treating formerly undruggable pancreatic tumors. The drug functions by binding to and neutralizing the molecular master switch of the malignancy.

headline: Tribblix Keeps Solaris Lineage Alive on Modern Hardware
lede: Tribblix preserves the unique SVR4 experience for a new generation of users. Milestone 40 marks the latest evolution of this independent distribution, bridging retro-inspired workflows with current Illumos stability.
